Ẹ wo bawọn ṣọja ṣe doju ibọn kọ awọn ọdọ ni Lekki  
Lekki is a significant city in Nigeria, known for its economic growth and development. It is one of the largest cities in the country and serves as a major hub for trade and industry. The city is home to several important institutions, including universities and research centers. Lekki is also a popular destination for both residents and tourists due to its natural beauty and recreational facilities.
